objective: Deliver bounded local traces and metrics, auditable owner error-report collection, a ResourceLease contract with mandatory VRAM headroom, deterministic fake providers and an idempotent turn replay harness for later modules.
non_goals: Do not integrate Prometheus, OpenTelemetry collectors, NVML control, real model weights, real speech engines, vector databases or dangerous tools.
Do not persist raw audio, hidden reasoning, public chat, screenshots, secrets or unredacted PII in logs or reports.
Do not run full M01 integration, repeat, soak or release workflow verification during the fast slice.
contracts: Trace records contain timestamps, bounded attributes, correlation/session/turn identifiers and duration but never hidden reasoning, raw media or unredacted secret fields.
Metric names and labels are validated, label keys use a low-cardinality allowlist and total series count has a hard cap.
Resource admission never allocates the reserved 2048 MiB VRAM headroom; leases expire by monotonic time and release is idempotent.
Fake model, speech, memory and tool providers are deterministic, local-only and never execute generated shell, JavaScript or Python.
Turn replay validates EventEnvelope v1, rejects conflicting event reuse and coalesces duplicate execution.
Owner error reports include only redacted structured error records plus build identity and can be generated with one command.
allowed_dependencies: Python 3.12+ standard library and existing local hina-contracts and hina-core modules.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests prove trace redaction, bounded metric cardinality, resource admission/headroom/release/expiry and safe report collection.
Unit tests prove deterministic fake providers, consent-gated fake memory, tool allowlisting and duplicate turn replay with one model/speech execution.
A single demo command runs a Vietnamese fake turn, produces trace/metric/error-report artifacts and shows resource headroom remains at least 2048 MiB.
The owner can run one error-report command after manual testing and receive a bounded JSON report without secrets.
Focused M01 fast tests complete once on the owner machine.
